Jersey approves assisted dying lawOnce the law is given Royal Assent the first legal assisted deaths could happen as early as 2027. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c62dnwwgryeo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c62dnwwgryeo#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 12:37:28 GMT

UK asylum claims drop slightly in 2025 as small boat arrivals rise by 13%Some 100,625 people claimed asylum in the year to December and about 40% of these arrived by small boats, figures show. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cly07pyde00o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cly07pyde00o#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 12:48:35 GMT
